author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: RoPEConvention enum (Interleaved/HalfRotation) with with_convention() constructor. Default stays Interleaved for backward compat. HalfRotation pairs (x[i], x[i+d/2]) for LLaMA/GPT-NeoX/Pythia. 6 new tests including correctness check, cross-convention difference, and identity at position 0. All 18 RoPE tests passing.
